name: Noble Knight's Shield-Bearer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>盾</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たて</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>持</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>も</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ち
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can banish 1 LIGHT monster from your GY; draw 1 card. You can banish this card from your hand or field; add 1 Level 6 or lower WIND Beast monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use 1 "Noble Knight's Shield-Bearer" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can banish 1 LIGHT monster from your GY; draw 1 card. You can only use 1 "Noble Knight's Shield-Bearer" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
